title: rosa dumalis f. racemulosa
intro: Rosa dumalis f. racemulosa is a variant of the Rosa dumalis plant, a type of fragrant, pink to white-flowering rose native to the Himalayas. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa dumalis f. racemulosa include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being.
